title: Wynncraft Silence Backstab
description:
Silence the screach from backstab! 

<!>Will affect other places where the same sounds are used.
body:
Silence the sound(s) that backstab makes. 
2 Versions to choose from!

<!> Sounds muted using these packs WILL have the unintended side effect of muting other instances of the sound being used ingame. 

-<VERSION A>-

-Mutes 2 sounds
  
  1. nether_wastes/mood3.ogg - (Shadow Siphon - Screach)
  
2. mob/evocation_illager/fangs.ogg - (Backstab - Munch)
  
-<VERSION B>- 

-Mutes only 1 sound
  
   1. nether_wastes/mood3.ogg (Shadow Siphon - Screach)

<Demonstration Video>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Qu6sCfMi1UM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
